name: -furry makeup!-
description:
get turned into a furry by a sweet makeup artist!!

getting kidnapped by a makeup artist wasn’t on your to-do list today, but when jordan spun you around in that salon chair and said hello, you just couldn’t help but go along!! even better, they specialize in animal prosthetics that are supposedly as realistic as it gets, so prepare to get furrified!
creator: CrispitySmuggity
